scenario: You are at a traditional Uzbek restaurant in Tashkent. You would like to order dinner for two people.

variants.description: A smooth dinner — your order arrives perfectly

turns.speaker: npc
turns.english: Hello! How many people?

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Two.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.english: Please, come in. Here is the menu.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.english: May I take your order?

turns.speaker: user
turns.uzbek: Iltimos, ikkita osh va bir choy.
turns.english: Please, two plov and one tea.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.english: Of course. Please wait a moment.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.english: Here you go. Bon appétit!

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Thank you! It looks very delicious.

variants.description: The plov has run out — you adapt your order

turns.speaker: npc
turns.english: Hello! How many people?

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Two.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.english: Please, come in. Here is the menu.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.english: May I take your order?

turns.speaker: user
turns.uzbek: Iltimos, ikkita osh va bir choy.
turns.english: Please, two plov and one tea.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.uzbek: Kechirasiz, bugun osh tugab qoldi. Kabob bormi?
turns.english: I'm sorry, the plov has run out today. Shall I bring kebab?

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Alright, two kebabs please.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.english: Of course! Please wait a moment.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.english: Hello! How many people?

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: One.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.english: Please, come in. Here is the menu.

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Are there any dishes without meat?

turns.speaker: npc
turns.uzbek: Ha, sabzavotli osh va somsa bor.
turns.english: Yes, we have vegetable plov and samsa.

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Vegetable plov, please.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.english: Sure, I'll bring it right away.
